title: INSOMA DUAL IRRIGATION VALVE ISSUE. New COMPLETE fingerprint
aiAnalysis:
Based on the GitHub issue, here is the structured device information:

## Device Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Brand** | Insoma |
| **Model** | Dual Irrigation Valve |
| **Purchase Link** | [AliExpress](https://nl.aliexpress.com/item/1005009732852108.html) |
| **Power Source** | Battery (receiveWhenIdle: false, powerSourceMains: false) |
| **Status** | Not pairing / Pairs but missing features / Not working at all |

## Zigbee Fingerprint

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **manufacturerName** | `_TZE284_fhvpaltk` |
| **productId (modelId)** | `TS0601` |
| **IEEE Address** | `64:02:8f:ff:fe:ac:1b:fb` |
| **Network Address** | 46830 |
| **Device Type** | End Device (sleepy) |

## Endpoint Details

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Endpoint ID** | 1 |
| **Application Device ID** | 81 (Smart Plug / On/Off Output) |
| **Application Profile ID** | 260 (Zigbee Home Automation) |

### Input Clusters
| Cluster ID | Name |
|------------|------|
| 0x0000 | Basic |
| 0x0004 | Groups |
| 0x0005 | Scenes |
| 0xEF00 | Tuya DP (proprietary) |
| 0x0000 | Basic (duplicate) |
| 0xED00 | Unknown (0xED00) |

### Output Clusters
| Cluster ID | Name |
|------------|------|
| 0x0019 | OTA |
| 0x000A | Time |

## Capabilities

| Capability | Value |
|------------|-------|
| alternatePANCoordinator | false |
| deviceType | false |
| powerSourceMains | false |
| receiveWhenIdle | false |
| security | false |
| allocateAddress | true |

## Basic Cluster Attributes

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| zclVersion | 3 |
| appVersion | 68 |
| stackVersion | 0 |
| hwVersion | 1 |
| manufacturerName | `_TZE284_fhvpaltk` |
| modelId | `TS0601` |

## Analysis

- **Fingerprint**: `_TZE284_fhvpaltk` + `TS0601` — **NEW** (not in current database)
- **Protocol**: Tuya DP (cluster 0xEF00 present)
- **Device Type**: Sleepy battery-powered end device
- **Application Device ID**: 81 (Smart Plug) — likely misidentified by firmware
- **Expected Driver**: `valve_irrigation` or similar valve/irrigation driver
- **Issue**: Device pairs but likely lacks proper DP mappings for dual irrigation valve functionality
